zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lowther於1544年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑時，他的父親Hugh Lowther Knt.34歲，母親Lady Dorothy Clifford32歲。他和Katherine Thynne至少有1個女兒。他去世於1637年9月15日在他的家鄉享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑。

nameMeanings.name: Lowther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lawther
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lowther   and   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lauder
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Lowther was born in 1544, in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Lowther Knt., was 34 and his mother, Lady Dorothy Clifford, was 32. He had at least 1 daughter with Katherine Thynne. He died on 15 September 1637, in his hometown, at the age of 93, and was buried in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lowther est né en 1544, à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Lowther Knt., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Dorothy Clifford, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Katherine Thynne. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1637, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lowther 1544 in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Lowther Knt. 34 und seine Mutter Lady Dorothy Clifford 32. Er hatte mit Katherine Thynne mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. September 1637 im Alter von 93 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lowther è nato il nel 1544 nel Lowther, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh Lowther Knt., aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Lady Dorothy Clifford, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Katherine Thynne. Morì il 15 settembre 1637, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Lowther, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lowtherが1544年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルで生まれた時，父Hugh Lowther Knt.は34歳，母Lady Dorothy Cliffordは32歳であった。彼はKatherine Thynneとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1637年9月15日に故郷で93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lowther(이)가 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Lowther Knt.(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Dorothy Clifford(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Katherine Thynne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1637년 9월 15일 그의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lowther nasceu em 1544, em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Lowther Knt., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Dorothy Clifford, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Katherine Thynne. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1637, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lowther родился в 1544 г. в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Lowther Knt. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Dorothy Clifford, 32. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Katherine Thynne. Он умер 15 сентября 1637 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lowther nació en 1544, en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Lowther Knt., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Dorothy Clifford, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Katherine Thynne. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1637, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
